name: Slagy
description: Slagy is part of a small fixed-element SMG set that always rolls with a Maliwan barrel, giving it boosted status chance and slightly cleaner accuracy. Because slag damage-over-time is inherently weak, its real job is not killing by itself but applying slag quickly so you can swap to a harder-hitting weapon and capitalize on the damage bonus.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It only appears at green rarity or higher. Related Bandit-made variants in the same fixed-element set include Barfy for corrosive, Burny for incendiary, and Shoky for shock.
